<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan details all files to be created for Architectural Requirements AR-001 through AR-011, implementing a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## AR-001: CI/CD Pipeline
10: 
11: ### GitHub Actions Workflows
12: 
13: #### File: `.github/workflows/main.yml`
14: **Purpose:** Pull request Docker build verification
15: **Logic:**
16: ```yaml
17: name: Agentcube CI Workflow
18: on:
19:   pull_request:
20:     branches: [main, release-*]
21: jobs:
22:   build:
23:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
24:     steps:
25:       - uses: actions/checkout@v3
26:       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
27:         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
28:       - name: Verify Docker versions
29:         run: docker --version && docker buildx version
30:       - name: Build Docker image
31:         run: make docker-build
32: ```
33: 
34: #### File: `.github/workflows/e2e.yml`
35: **Purpose:** End-to-end testing on Kind
36: **Logic:**
37: - Triggers on PR to main/release-*
38: - Uses Go 1.23, installs Kind v0.30.0 via `helm/kind-action@v1` with `install_only: true`
39: - Sets `ARTIFACTS_PATH=${{ github.workspace }}/e2e-logs`
40: - Runs `make e2e`
41: - Uploads `e2e-logs/` on failure
42: - Always runs `make e2e-clean`
43: 
44: #### File: `.github/workflows/lint.yml`
45: **Purpose:** Go lint on changed code
46: **Logic:**
47: - Uses `dorny/paths-filter@v3` with filter `lint`: `**/*.go`, `go.mod`, `go.sum`, `.golangci.yml`, `.github/workflows/lint.yml`
48: - Uses Go 1.24
49: - Runs `make lint`
50: 
51: #### File: `.github/workflows/python-sdk-tests.yml`
52: **Purpose:** Python SDK unit tests
53: **Logic:**
54: - Uses paths-filter for `sdk-python/**`
55: - Python 3.12, working-directory: `sdk-python/`
56: - `pip install pytest`, `pip install -e .`
57: - `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
58: 
59: #### File: `.github/workflows/python-lint.yml`
60: **Purpose:** Python lint (Ruff)
61: **Logic:**
62: - Paths: `cmd/cli/**`, `sdk-python/**`, `example/**`, `test/**/*.py`, `pyproject.toml`, workflow file
63: - Python 3.10
64: - `pip install ruff`
65: - `python3 -m ruff check . --config pyproject.toml`
66: 
67: #### File: `.github/workflows/test-coverage.yml`
68: **Purpose:** Go test coverage with race detection
69: **Logic:**
70: - Paths filter `coverage` (broad glob excluding media/docs)
71: - Go 1.24, free disk space step
72: - `go test -race -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -coverpkg=./pkg/... ./pkg/...`
73: - Upload `coverage.out` artifact
74: - Optional Codecov upload with `secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN`
75: 
76: #### File: `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml`
77: **Purpose:** Verify generated code is up to date
78: **Logic:**
79: - Paths: `pkg/apis/**`, `hack/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, `Makefile`
80: - Go 1.24.4
81: - `make gen-check` (runs `gen-all` then `git diff --exit-code`)
82: 
83: #### File: `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml`
84: **Purpose:** Copyright header verification
85: **Logic:**
86: - Paths: all files except `*.md`, `*.svg`, `*.png`, `docs/**`, `.github/**`
87: - `apt install moreutils`
88: - `make gen-copyright`
89: - `git diff --exit-code`
90: 
91: #### File: `.github/workflows/codespell.yml`
92: **Purpose:** Spelling check
93: **Logic:**
94: - Backup/remove `pyproject.toml`, `package.json`, `package-lock.json`
95: - `pip install codespell`
96: - Run codespell with `--check-filenames`, skip globs, `--ignore-words-list fo,nam,te,notin,NotIn`
97: - Restore backed-up files
98: 
99: #### File: `.github/workflows/build-push-release.yml`
100: **Purpose:** Build and push multi-arch images
101: **Logic:**
102: - Triggers: push to main, push tags `v*.*.*`, `v*.*.*-*`
103: - Go 1.24.4, Docker Buildx
104: - Login to `ghcr.io` with `GITHUB_TOKEN`
105: - Set `TAG` from `github.ref_type` (tag or latest)
106: - Run `make docker-buildx-push`, `docker-buildx-push-router`, `docker-buildx-push-picod`
107: - Set `IMAGE_REGISTRY=ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}`
108: 
109: #### File: `.github/workflows/dify-plugin-publish.yml`
110: **Purpose:** Publish Dify plugin on tag
111: **Logic:**
112: - Trigger: push tags `dify-plugin/v*`
113: - Download dify-plugin CLI 0.0.6
114: - Install yq, read `manifest.yaml`
115: - Package plugin, checkout `author/dify-plugins` with token
116: - Create branch, commit, push, create PR to `langgenius/dify-plugins`
117: 
118: #### File: `.github/workflows/workflows-approve.yml`
119: **Purpose:** Auto-approve workflows for repeat contributors
120: **Logic:**
121: - `pull_request_target` on labeled/sync events
122: - Check if contributor has >1 PR or has `ok-to-test` label
123: - List `action_required` runs for head SHA
124: - Call `approveWorkflowRun` for each
125: 
126: ---
127: 
128: ## AR-002: Python SDK
129: 
130: ### Package Structure: `sdk-python/`
131: 
132: #### File: `sdk-python/pyproject.toml`
133: **Purpose:** Package metadata and dependencies
134: **Logic:**
135: ```toml
136: [project]
137: name = "agentcube-sdk"
138: version = "0.0.10"
139: requires-python = ">=3.10"
140: dependencies = ["requests", "PyJWT>=2.0.0", "cryptography"]
141: 
142: [build-system]
143: requires = ["setuptools>=61.0", "wheel"]
144: build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
145: 
146: [tool.setuptools]
147: packages = ["agentcube", "agentcube.clients", "agentcube.utils"]
148: 
149: [project.scripts]
150: # No CLI entry for SDK
151: ```
152: 
153: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/__init__.py`
154: **Purpose:** Public exports
155: **Logic:**
156: ```python
157: from .code_interpreter import CodeInterpreterClient
158: from .agent_runtime import AgentRuntimeClient
159: 
160: __all__ = ["CodeInterpreterClient", "AgentRuntimeClient"]
161: __version__ = "0.0.10"
162: ```
163: 
164: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/exceptions.py`
165: **Purpose:** Exception hierarchy
166: **Logic:**
167: ```python
168: class AgentCubeError(Exception):
169:     """Base exception for AgentCube SDK"""
170:     pass
171: 
172: class CommandExecutionError(AgentCubeError):
173:     def __init__(self, exit_code, stderr, command=None):
174:         self.exit_code = exit_code
175:         self.stderr = stderr
176:         self.command = command
177:         super().__init__(f"Command failed (exit {exit_code}): {stderr}")
178: 
179: class SessionError(AgentCubeError):
180:     """Raised when session creation or management fails"""
181:     pass
182: 
183: class DataPlaneError(AgentCubeError):
184:     """Raised when Data Plane operations fail"""
185:     pass
186: ```
187: 
188: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/code_interpreter.py`
189: **Purpose:** CodeInterpreterClient main entry point
190: **Logic:**
191: - Constructor: accepts `name`, `namespace`, `ttl`, `workload_manager_url`, `router_url`, `auth_token`, `verbose`, `session_id`
192: - Resolves `router_url` from arg or `ROUTER_URL` env var (raises `ValueError` if missing)
193: - Creates `ControlPlaneClient` for workload manager communication
194: - If `session_id` provided: reuse; else call `create_session`
195: - Initialize `CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient` with session header
196: - Context manager: `__enter__` returns self; `__exit__` calls `stop()`
197: - `stop()`: closes data plane, deletes control plane session if owned, closes HTTP session
198: - `_init_data_plane()`: on failure after session create, log warning, delete session, re-raise
199: - `execute_command(command, timeout)`: delegate to data plane, raise `CommandExecutionError` on non-zero exit
200: - `run_code(language, code, timeout)`: for python/py/python3, write `.py` file and execute `python3 <file>`
201: - `write_file(content, remote_path)`, `upload_file(local_path, remote_path)`, `download_file(remote_path, local_path)`, `list_files(path)`: delegate to data plane
202: 
203: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/agent_runtime.py`
204: **Purpose:** AgentRuntimeClient
205: **Logic:**
206: - Constructor: `agent_name`, `namespace`, `router_url`, `verbose`, `session_id`, `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`
207: - `__enter__` returns self; `__exit__` calls `close()`
208: - If `session_id` not provided: GET `{router}/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/` to read `x-agentcube-session-id` header (raises `ValueError` if missing)
209: - `invoke(payload, timeout)`: POST JSON to base URL with session header; timeout tuple `(connect_timeout, self.timeout)`
210: - `close()`: close underlying `requests.Session`
211: 
212: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/__init__.py`
213: **Purpose:** Re-export client classes
214: **Logic:**
215: ```python
216: from .control_plane import ControlPlaneClient
217: from .code_interpreter_data_plane import CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient
218: from .agent_runtime_data_plane import AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient
219: 
220: __all__ = ["ControlPlaneClient", "CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient", "AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient"]
221: ```
222: 
223: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/control_plane.py`
224: **Purpose:** Workload Manager HTTP client
225: **Logic:**
226: - Constructor: `workload_manager_url` or `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` env, `auth_token` or SA token file (`/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token`), `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`, `pool_connections=10`, `pool_maxsize=10`
227: - Sets `Content-Type: application/json`, `Authorization: Bearer {token}` if token present
228: - `create_session(name, namespace, metadata, ttl)`: POST `{base_url}/v1/code-interpreter` with JSON body; return `data["sessionId"]` or raise `ValueError`
229: - `delete_session(session_id)`: DELETE `{base_url}/v1/code-interpreter/sessions/{session_id}`; return `True` on 404 or success, log and return `False` on other failures
230: - `close()`: close HTTP session
231: 
232: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/code_interpreter_data_plane.py`
233: **Purpose:** Code Interpreter data plane client
234: **Logic:**
235: - Constructor: `session_id`, `router_url`, `namespace`, `cr_name`, `base_url` (or build from router_url+namespace+cr_name), `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`, pool settings
236: - Base URL: `urljoin(router_url, "/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/code-interpreters/{cr_name}/invocations/")`
237: - Session header: `x-agentcube-session-id: {session_id}`
238: - `execute_command(command, timeout)`: POST `api/execute` with JSON `{"command": [...], "timeout": "<n>s"}`; read timeout = `timeout_value + 2.0`; raise `CommandExecutionError` on non-zero exit
239: - `write_file(content, remote_path)`: POST `api/files` with JSON `{"path", "content" (base64), "mode": "0644"}`
240: - `upload_file(local_path, remote_path)`: POST multipart to `api/files` with file and `x-agentcube-session-id` header
241: - `download_file(remote_path, local_path)`: GET `api/files/{path}` with `stream=True`, write to local
242: - `list_files(path)`: GET `api/files?path=...`
243: - `close()`: close HTTP session
244: 
245: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/agent_runtime_data_plane.py`
246: **Purpose:** Agent Runtime data plane client
247: **Logic:**
248: - `SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"`
249: - Constructor: `router_url`, `namespace`, `agent_name`, `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`, pool settings
250: - Base URL: `urljoin(router_url, "/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/")`
251: - `bootstrap_session_id()`: GET base URL, read `x-agentcube-session-id` header
252: - `invoke(session_id, payload, timeout)`: POST base URL with JSON payload, session header, `Content-Type: application/json`; timeout tuple
253: - `close()`: close HTTP session
254: 
255: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/utils/http.py`
256: **Purpose:** HTTP session factory
257: **Logic:**
258: ```python
259: import requests
260: from requests.adapters import HTTPAdapter
261: 
262: def create_session(pool_connections=10, pool_maxsize=10):
263:     session = requests.Session()
264:     adapter = HTTPAdapter(pool_connections=pool_connections, pool_maxsize=pool_maxsize)
265:     session.mount("http://", adapter)
266:     session.mount("https://", adapter)
267:     return session
268: ```
269: 
270: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/utils/utils.py`
271: **Purpose:** Utility functions
272: **Logic:**
273: ```python
274: def read_token_from_file(file_path):
275:     try:
276:         with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
277:             return f.read().strip()
278:     except FileNotFoundError:
279:         return ""
280: ```
281: 
282: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/utils/log.py`
283: **Purpose:** Logging utility
284: **Logic:**
285: ```python
286: import logging
287: 
288: def get_logger(name, level=logging.INFO):
289:     logger = logging.getLogger(name)
290:     logger.setLevel(level)
291:     return logger
292: ```
293: 
294: ---
295: 
296: ## AR-003: Deployment (Helm Chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile)
297: 
298: ### Helm Chart: `manifests/charts/base/`
299: 
300: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/Chart.yaml`
301: **Purpose:** Chart metadata
302: ```yaml
303: apiVersion: v1
304: name: agentcube
305: description: A Helm chart for AgentCube
306: version: 0.1.0
307: appVersion: 1.0.0
308: ```
309: 
310: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/values.yaml`
311: **Purpose:** Default configuration values
312: **Logic:**
313: - `imagePullSecrets: []`
314: - `redis.addr: ""`, `redis.password: ""`
315: - `router.replicas: 1`, `router.image.repository/tag/pullPolicy`, `router.service.type/port/targetPort`, `router.resources`, `router.config: {}`, `router.extraEnv: []`, `router.serviceAccountName: ""`, `router.rbac.create: false`
316: - `workloadmanager.replicas: 1`, `workloadmanager.image/repository/tag/pullPolicy`, `workloadmanager.service.type/port`, `workloadmanager.resources`, `workloadmanager.extraEnv: []`
317: - `volcano.scheduler.enabled: false`, `volcano.scheduler.replicas: 1`, `volcano.scheduler.image/repository/tag/pullPolicy`
318: 
319: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/workloadmanager.yaml`
320: **Purpose:** Workload Manager Deployment + Service
321: **Logic:**
322: - Deployment: `replicas` from values, `serviceAccountName: workloadmanager`
323: - Container: image from values, port `http` at `workloadmanager.service.port`
324: - Env: `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` (fieldRef), `REDIS_PASSWORD`, `REDIS_ADDR`, `workloadmanager.extraEnv`
325: - Args: `--port={{ workloadmanager.service.port }}`, `--runtime-class-name=`
326: - Resources from values
327: - Liveness/Readiness: HTTP GET `/health` on service port, delays 10s/5s
328: - Service: `type`, `port` from values, selector `app: workloadmanager`
329: 
330: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/agentcube-router.yaml`
331: **Purpose:** Router Deployment + Service
332: **Logic:**
333: - Deployment: `replicas`, conditional `serviceAccountName`
334: - Env: `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` (fieldRef), `REDIS_ADDR`, `REDIS_PASSWORD`, `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL=http://workloadmanager.{{.Release.Namespace}}.svc.cluster.local:{{port}}`, `router.extraEnv`
335: - Args: `--port={{ router.service.targetPort }}`, `--debug`
336: - Liveness `/health/live`, Readiness `/health/ready` on targetPort
337: - Service: ClusterIP, port/targetPort from values
338: 
339: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/rbac/workloadmanager.yaml`
340: **Purpose:** RBAC for Workload Manager
341: **Logic:**
342: - ServiceAccount `workloadmanager` in release namespace
343: - ClusterRole `workloadmanager` with rules for: `agents.x-k8s.io/sandboxes`, `extensions.agents.x-k8s.io/sandboxclaims/sandboxtemplates/sandboxwarmpools`, `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/codeinterpreters/agentruntimes`, `pods`, `tokenreviews`, `secrets`
344: - ClusterRoleBinding `workloadmanager` binding SA to ClusterRole
345: 
346: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/rbac-router.yaml`
347: **Purpose:** Optional Router RBAC (conditional)
348: **Logic:**
349: - Rendered only if `router.rbac.create` is true
350: - ServiceAccount with name from `router.serviceAccountName` or default `agentcube-router`
351: - Role allowing `secrets` verbs in release namespace
352: - RoleBinding

724: #### File: `pkg/router/server.go`
725: **Purpose:** HTTP server and routes
726: **Logic:**
727: - `Server` struct: `config`, `engine` (Gin), `httpServer`, `sessionManager`, `storeClient`, `httpTransport`, `jwtManager`
728: - Route table:
729:   - `GET /health/live` → `handleHealthLive` (no middleware)
730:   - `GET /health/ready` → `handleHealthReady` (no middleware)
731:   - `GET|POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path` → `handleAgentInvoke` (logger, recovery, concurrency middleware)
732:   - `GET|POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path` → `handleCodeInterpreterInvoke`
733: - Concurrency middleware: semaphore with capacity `MaxConcurrentRequests` (default 1000)
734: - HTTP server: `h2c` wrapping, `ReadTimeout 30s`, `IdleTimeout 90s`
735: 
736: #### File: `pkg/router/session_manager.go`
737: **Purpose:** Session resolution
738: **Logic:**
739: - `SessionManager` interface: `GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, kind)`
740: - `manager` struct: `storeClient`, `workloadMgrAddr`, `httpClient`
741: - Constructor: reads `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` (required), creates HTTP client (timeout 2m, MaxIdleConnsPerHost 100, http2 config)
742: - `GetSandboxBySession`:
743:   - Empty session ID → POST to workload manager to create sandbox
744:   - Non-empty → load from store
745:   - Returns `NewSessionNotFoundError` on missing
746:   - Returns `NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError` on workload manager 404
747:

750: **Logic:**
751: - Constants: `rsaKeySize = 2048`, `jwtExpiration = 5m`, `IdentitySecretName = "picod-router-identity"`
752: - `JWTManager`: holds RSA key pair, k8s clientset
753: - `NewJWTManager()`: generates RSA key pair
754: - `GenerateToken(claims)`: creates JWT with `exp`, `iat`, `iss="agentcube-router"`, signs with RS256
755: - `TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx)`: creates or loads secret `picod-router-identity` in `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` or `default`
756:

761: - `forwardToSandbox`: determines upstream URL from EntryPoints (first match on path prefix, else first entry), builds reverse proxy, sets forwarding headers, injects JWT for Sandbox/SandboxClaim kinds
762: - Proxy error mapping: connection refused → 502, timeout → 504

775: ## AR-007: Idle Cleanup (Agentd)
776: 
777: ### Package: `pkg/agentd/`
778: 
779: #### File: `pkg/agentd/controller.go`
780: **Purpose:** Sandbox idle cleanup controller
781: **Logic:**
782: ```go
783: var SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
784: 
785: type Reconciler struct {
786:     client.Client
787:     Scheme *runtime.Scheme
788: }
789: 
790: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
791:     sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
792:     if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {
793:         if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
794:             return ctrl.Result{}, nil
795:         }
796:         return ctrl.Result{}, err
797:     }
798:     
799:     lastActivityStr, exists := sandbox.Annotations[workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
800:     if !exists || lastActivityStr == "" {
801:         return ctrl.Result{}, nil
802:     }
803:     
804:     lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
805:     if err != nil {
806:         return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
807:     }
808:     
809:     expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
810:     if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
811:         if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil && !errors.IsNotFound(err) {
812:             return ctrl.Result{}, err
813:         }
814:         return ctrl.Result{}, nil
815:     }
816:     
817:     return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
818: }
819: 
820: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
821:     return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).Complete(r)
822: }
823: ```
824: 
825: #### File: `cmd/agentd/main.go`

1102:

1114: **Purpose:** HTTP server
1115: **Logic:**
1116: - Gin engine with Logger/Recovery middleware
1117: - `authManager.LoadPublicKeyFromEnv()` - fatal if missing/invalid
1118: - Routes:
1119:   - `GET /health` (no auth)
1120:   - `POST /api/execute` (auth)
1121:   - `POST /api/files` (auth)
1122:   - `GET /api/files` (auth)
1123:   - `GET /api/files/*path` (auth)
1124: - Workspace resolution: uses CWD if empty
1125: - HTTP server: `ReadHeaderTimeout 10s`
1126: 
1127: #### File: `pkg/picod/auth.go`
1128: **Purpose:** JWT authentication
1129: **Logic:**
1130: ```go
1131: const (
1132:     PublicKeyEnvVar = "PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY"
1133:     MaxBodySize = 32 << 20 // 32 MiB
1134: )
1135: 
1136: type AuthManager struct {
1137:     publicKey *rsa.PublicKey
1138:     mutex sync.RWMutex
1139: }
1140: 
1141: func (am *AuthManager) LoadPublicKeyFromEnv() error // loads from env, parses PEM
1142: func (am *AuthManager) AuthMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc // validates Bearer token with RS256
1143: ```
1144: - Middleware requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
1145: - Rejects non-RSA signing methods
1146: - Applies `http.MaxBytesReader` after validation
1147: 
1148: #### File: `pkg/picod/execute.go`
1149: **Purpose:** Command execution
1150: **Logic:**
1151: ```go
1152: const TimeoutExitCode = 124

1154: type ExecuteRequest struct {

1166:     StartTime time.Time `json:"start_time"`
1167:     EndTime   time.Time `json:"end_time"`
1168: }
1169: ```
1170: - Default timeout: 60s
1171: - Context deadline exceeded: exit code 124
1172: - Captures stdout/stderr to buffers
1173: - Sets `cmd.Dir` to sanitized working directory
1174: 
1175: #### File: `pkg/picod/files.go`
1176: **Purpose:** File operations
1177: **Logic:**

1187:

1189:     Path    string `json:"path" binding:"required"`
1190:     Content string `json:"content" binding:"required"`

1192: }
1193: 
1194: type ListFilesResponse struct {
1195:     Files []FileEntry `json:"files"`
1196: }
1197: ```
1198: - `UploadFileHandler`: multipart or JSON/Base64
1199: - `ListFilesHandler`: requires `path` query param
1200: - `DownloadFileHandler`: sets download headers
1201: - `sanitizePath`: prevents directory traversal
1202: 
1203: #### File: `cmd/picod/main.go`
1204: **Purpose:** Binary entry point
1205: **Logic:**
1206: - Flags: `-port` (default 8080), `-workspace` (default empty → CWD)

1208: - Creates `Config`, `NewServer()`, `server.Run()`

1210: ---

1212: ## AR-010: Session Store (Redis/Valkey)

1216: #### File: `pkg/store/interface.go`
1217: **Purpose:** Store interface
1218: **Logic:**
1219: ```go
1220: type Store interface {

1223:     StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
1224:     UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
1225:     DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
1226:     ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
1227:     ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
1228:     UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
1229:     Close() error
1230: }
1231: 
1232: var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")
1233: ```
1234: 
1235: #### File: `pkg/store/singleton.go`
1236: **Purpose:** Singleton access
1237: **Logic:**
1238: ```go
1239: const (
1240:     redisStoreType  = "redis"

1242: )
1243: 
1244: var (
1245:     initStoreOnce = &sync.Once{}

1247: )
1248: 
1249: func Storage() Store {
1250:     initStoreOnce.Do(func() {

1252:             klog.Fatalf("init store failed: %v", err)
1253:         }
1254:     })

1258: func initStore() error // reads STORE_TYPE, creates appropriate store

1261: #### File: `pkg/store/store_redis.go`
1262: **Purpose:** Redis implementation
1263: **Logic:**
1264: ```go
1265: type redisStore struct {

<content>1: package router
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"fmt"
6: 	"net/http"
7: 	"os"
8: 	"strings"
9: 	"sync"
10: 	"time"
11: 
12: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
13: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2"
14: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c"
15: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
16: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
17: 
18: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
19: )
20: 
21: type Server struct {
22: 	config         *Config
23: 	engine         *gin.Engine
24: 	httpServer     *http.Server
25: 	sessionManager SessionManager
26: 	storeClient    store.Store
27: 	httpTransport  *http.Transport
28: 	jwtManager     *JWTManager
29: 	semaphore      chan struct{}
30: }
31: 
32: func NewServer(config *Config, storeClient store.Store, clientset kubernetes.Interface) (*Server, error) {
33: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
34: 	if config.Debug {
35: 		gin.SetMode(gin.DebugMode)
36: 	}
37: 
38: 	engine := gin.New()
39: 	engine.Use(gin.Logger())
40: 	engine.Use(gin.Recovery())
41: 
42: 	sessionManager, err := NewSessionManager(storeClient)
43: 	if err != nil {
44: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create session manager: %w", err)
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	var jwtManager *JWTManager
48: 	if clientset != nil {
49: 		jwtManager, err = NewJWTManager(clientset)
50: 		if err != nil {
51: 			klog.Warningf("Failed to create JWT manager: %w", err)
52: 		}
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	maxConcurrent := config.MaxConcurrentRequests
56: 	if maxConcurrent <= 0 {
57: 		maxConcurrent = 1000
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	s := &Server{
61: 		config:         config,
62: 		engine:         engine,
63: 		sessionManager: sessionManager,
64: 		storeClient:    storeClient,
65: 		jwtManager:     jwtManager,
66: 		semaphore:      make(chan struct{}, maxConcurrent),
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	s.setupRoutes()
70: 
71: 	return s, nil
72: }
73: 
74: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
75: 	s.engine.GET("/health/live", s.handleHealthLive)
76: 	s.engine.GET("/health/ready", s.handleHealthReady)
77: 
78: 	invocationGroup := s.engine.Group("/")
79: 	invocationGroup.Use(s.concurrencyMiddleware())
80: 	{
81: 		invocationGroup.GET("/v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleAgentInvoke)
82: 		invocationGroup.POST("/v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleAgentInvoke)
83: 		invocationGroup.GET("/v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleCodeInterpreterInvoke)
84: 		invocationGroup.POST("/v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path", s.handleCodeInterpreterInvoke)
85: 	}
86: }
87: 
88: func (s *Server) concurrencyMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
89: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
90: 		select {
91: 		case s.semaphore <- struct{}{}:
92: 			defer func() { <-s.semaphore }()
93: 			c.Next()
94: 		default:
95: 			c.JSON(http.StatusTooManyRequests, gin.H{"error": "too many requests"})
96: 			c.Abort()
97: 		}
98: 	}
99: }
100: 
101: func (s *Server) Run() error {
102: 	if s.jwtManager != nil {
103: 		ctx := context.Background()
104: 		if err := s.jwtManager.TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx); err != nil {
105: 			klog.Warningf("Failed to store or load JWT key secret: %v", err)
106: 		}
107: 	}
108: 
109: 	addr := fmt.Sprintf(":%s", s.config.Port)
110: 
111: 	var handler http.Handler = s.engine
112: 	if !s.config.EnableTLS {
113: 		h2s := &http2.Server{}
114: 		handler = h2c.NewHandler(s.engine, h2s)
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
118: 		Addr:        addr,
119: 		Handler:     handler,
120: 		ReadTimeout: 30 * time.Second,
121: 		IdleTimeout: 90 * time.Second,
122: 	}
123: 
124: 	if s.config.EnableTLS {
125: 		klog.Infof("Starting HTTPS server on %s", addr)
126: 		return s.httpServer.ListenAndServeTLS(s.config.TLSCert, s.config.TLSKey)
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	klog.Infof("Starting HTTP server on %s", addr)
130: 	return s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
131: }
132: 
133: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
134: 	if s.httpServer != nil {
135: 		return s.httpServer.Shutdown(ctx)
136: 	}
137: 	return nil
138: }
139: 
140: func (s *Server) GetSessionManager() SessionManager {
141: 	return s.sessionManager
142: }
143: 
144: func (s *Server) GetJWTManager() *JWTManager {
145: 	return s.jwtManager
146: }
147: 
148: func GetNamespace() string {
149: 	ns := os.Getenv("AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE")
150: 	if ns == "" {
151: 		return "default"
152: 	}
153: 	return ns
154: }
155: 
156: func getRouterURL() string {
157: 	return strings.TrimSuffix(os.Getenv("ROUTER_URL"), "/")
158: }
159: 
160: var (
161: 	clientsetCache     kubernetes.Interface
162: 	clientsetCacheOnce sync.Once
163: )
164: 
165: func GetClientset() kubernetes.Interface {
166: 	clientsetCacheOnce.Do(func() {
167: 		cfg, err := kubernetes.NewInClusterConfig()
168: 		if err != nil {
169: 			klog.Warningf("Failed to get in-cluster config: %v", err)
170: 			return
171: 		}
172: 		clientsetCache, err = kubernetes.NewForConfig(cfg)
173: 		if err != nil {
174: 			klog.Warningf("Failed to create clientset: %v", err)
175: 		}
176: 	})
177: 	return clientsetCache
178: }

<content>1: package router
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"errors"
6: 	"fmt"
7: 	"io"
8: 	"net"
9: 	"net/http"
10: 	"net/http/httputil"
11: 	"net/url"
12: 	"strings"
13: 	"time"
14: 
15: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
16: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
17: 
18: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
19: )
20: 
21: type ResourceKind string
22: 
23: const (
24: 	KindAgentRuntime    ResourceKind = "agent-runtime"
25: 	KindCodeInterpreter ResourceKind = "code-interpreter"
26: )
27: 
28: func (s *Server) handleHealthLive(c *gin.Context) {
29: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "alive"})
30: }
31: 
32: func (s *Server) handleHealthReady(c *gin.Context) {
33: 	if s.sessionManager == nil {
34: 		c.JSON(http.StatusServiceUnavailable, gin.H{"status": "not ready", "error": "session manager not initialized"})
35: 		return
36: 	}
37: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ready"})
38: }
39: 
40: func (s *Server) handleAgentInvoke(c *gin.Context) {
41: 	s.handleInvoke(c, KindAgentRuntime)
42: }
43: 
44: func (s *Server) handleCodeInterpreterInvoke(c *gin.Context) {
45: 	s.handleInvoke(c, KindCodeInterpreter)
46: }
47: 
48: func (s *Server) handleInvoke(c *gin.Context, kind ResourceKind) {
49: 	namespace := c.Param("namespace")
50: 	name := c.Param("name")
51: 	path := c.Param("path")
52: 
53: 	sessionID := c.GetHeader(SessionHeaderKey)
54: 
55: 	ctx := c.Request.Context()
56: 
57: 	sandbox, err := s.sessionManager.GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, string(kind))
58: 	if err != nil {
59: 		handleSessionError(c, err)
60: 		return
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	if err := s.updateLastActivity(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
64: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to update last activity for session %s: %v", sandbox.SessionID, err)
65: 	}
66: 
67: 	if err := s.forwardToSandbox(c, sandbox, path); err != nil {
68: 		handleForwardError(c, err)
69: 		return
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	c.Header(SessionHeaderKey, sandbox.SessionID)
73: }
74: 
75: func (s *Server) updateLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
76: 	return s.storeClient.UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sandbox.SessionID, time.Now())
77: }
78: 
79: func (s *Server) forwardToSandbox(c *gin.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo, path string) error {
80: 	if len(sandbox.EntryPoints) == 0 {
81: 		return errors.New("no entry points available for sandbox")
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	var targetEntry *types.SandboxEntryPoint
85: 	for i := range sandbox.EntryPoints {
86: 		if path != "" && strings.HasPrefix(path, sandbox.EntryPoints[i].Path) {
87: 			targetEntry = &sandbox.EntryPoints[i]
88: 			break
89: 		}
90: 	}
91: 	if targetEntry == nil {
92: 		targetEntry = &sandbox.EntryPoints[0]
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	targetURL, err := url.Parse(targetEntry.Endpoint)
96: 	if err != nil {
97: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse entry point endpoint: %w", err)
98: 	}
99: 
100: 	proxy := httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy(targetURL)
101: 
102: 	proxy.Director = func(req *http.Request) {
103: 		req.URL.Scheme = targetURL.Scheme
104: 		req.URL.Host = targetURL.Host
105: 		req.URL.Path = singleJoiningSlash(targetURL.Path, path)
106: 		req.Host = targetURL.Host
107: 
108: 		if _, ok := req.Header["User-Agent"]; !ok {
109: 			req.Header.Set("User-Agent", "agentcube-router")
110: 		}
111: 
112: 		for key, values := range c.Request.Header {
113: 			for _, value := range values {
114: 				req.Header.Add(key, value)
115: 			}
116: 		}
117: 
118: 		if s.jwtManager != nil {
119: 			token, err := s.jwtManager.GenerateToken(sandbox.SessionID)
120: 			if err != nil {
121: 				klog.Warningf("Failed to generate JWT token: %v", err)
122: 			} else {
123: 				req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
124: 			}
125: 		}
126: 	}
127: 
128: 	proxy.ErrorHandler = func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, err error) {
129: 		klog.Errorf("Proxy error for %s: %v", r.URL.Path, err)
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	proxy.ServeHTTP(c.Writer, c.Request)
133: 	return nil
134: }
135: 
136: func handleSessionError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
137: 	klog.Errorf("Session error: %v", err)
138: 	c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
139: }
140: 
141: func handleForwardError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
142: 	klog.Errorf("Forward error: %v", err)
143: 
144: 	var netErr net.Error
145: 	if errors.As(err, &netErr) {
146: 		if netErr.Timeout() {
147: 			c.JSON(http.StatusGatewayTimeout, gin.H{"error": "upstream timeout"})
148: 			return
149: 		}
150: 		if netErr.(*net.OpError) != nil {
151: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": "connection refused"})
152: 			return
153: 		}
154: 	}
155: 
156: 	c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
157: }
158: 
159: func singleJoiningSlash(a, b string) string {
160: 	aslash := strings.HasSuffix(a, "/")
161: 	bslash := strings.HasPrefix(b, "/")
162: 	switch {
163: 	case aslash && bslash:
164: 		return a + b[1:]
165: 	case !aslash && !bslash:
166: 		return a + "/" + b
167: 	}
168: 	return a + b
169: }
170: 
171: func copyHeader(dst, src http.Header) {
172: 	for k, vv := range src {
173: 		for _, v := range vv {
174: 			dst.Add(k, v)
175: 		}
176: 	}
177: }
178: 
179: type responseWriter struct {
180: 	http.ResponseWriter
181: 	statusCode int
182: }
183: 
184: func (rw *responseWriter) WriteHeader(code int) {
185: 	rw.statusCode = code
186: 	rw.ResponseWriter.WriteHeader(code)
187: }
188: 
189: type responseCapture struct {
190: 	body io.Writer
191: 	http.ResponseWriter
192: }
193: 
194: func (rc *responseCapture) Write(b []byte) (int, error) {
195: 	return rc.body.Write(b)
196: }

(End of file - total 196 lines)
</content>

<content>1: package router
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"encoding/json"
6: 	"errors"
7: 	"fmt"
8: 	"io"
9: 	"net/http"
10: 	"net/url"
11: 	"os"
12: 	"strings"
13: 	"time"
14: 
15: 	"golang.org/x/net/http2"
16: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
17: 
18: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/api"
19: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
20: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
21: )
22: 
23: const SessionHeaderKey = "x-agentcube-session-id"
24: 
25: var (
26: 	ErrSessionNotFound         = errors.New("session not found")
27: 	ErrSandboxTemplateNotFound = errors.New("sandbox template not found")
28: )
29: 
30: type SessionManager interface {
31: 	GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
32: }
33: 
34: type manager struct {
35: 	storeClient     store.Store
36: 	workloadMgrAddr string
37: 	httpClient      *http.Client
38: }
39: 
40: func NewSessionManager(storeClient store.Store) (SessionManager, error) {
41: 	workloadMgrAddr := os.Getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL")
42: 	if workloadMgrAddr == "" {
43: 		return nil, errors.New("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL environment variable is required")
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	transport := &http.Transport{
47: 		MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100,
48: 		IdleConnTimeout:     90 * time.Second,
49: 	}
50: 
51: 	http2.ConfigureTransport(transport)
52: 
53: 	httpClient := &http.Client{
54: 		Timeout:   2 * time.Minute,
55: 		Transport: transport,
56: 	}
57: 
58: 	return &manager{
59: 		storeClient:     storeClient,
60: 		workloadMgrAddr: workloadMgrAddr,
61: 		httpClient:      httpClient,
62: 	}, nil
63: }
64: 
65: func (m *manager) GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
66: 	if sessionID == "" {
67: 		return m.createSandbox(ctx, namespace, name, kind)
68: 	}
69: 
70: 	sandbox, err := m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
71: 	if err != nil {
72: 		if errors.Is(err, store.ErrNotFound) {
73: 			return nil, api.NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID)
74: 		}
75: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get sandbox from store: %w", err)
76: 	}
77: 
78: 	return sandbox, nil
79: }
80: 
81: func (m *manager) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
82: 	reqBody := types.CreateSandboxRequest{
83: 		Kind:      kind,
84: 		Name:      name,
85: 		Namespace: namespace,
86: 	}
87: 
88: 	bodyBytes, err := json.Marshal(reqBody)
89: 	if err != nil {
90: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal request: %w", err)
91: 	}
92: 
93: 	var endpoint string
94: 	switch strings.ToLower(kind) {
95: 	case "agentruntime", "agent-runtime":
96: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/agent-runtime", m.workloadMgrAddr)
97: 	case "codeinterpreter", "code-interpreter":
98: 		endpoint = fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/code-interpreter", m.workloadMgrAddr)
99: 	default:
100: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported kind: %s", kind)
101: 	}
102: 
103: 	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodPost, endpoint, strings.NewReader(string(bodyBytes)))
104: 	if err != nil {
105: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create request: %w", err)
106: 	}
107: 	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
108: 
109: 	resp, err := m.httpClient.Do(req)
110: 	if err != nil {
111: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to send request to workload manager: %w", err)
112: 	}
113: 	defer resp.Body.Close()
114: 
115: 	if resp.StatusCode == http.StatusNotFound {
116: 		return nil, api.NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(namespace, name, kind)
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
120: 		body, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
121: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("workload manager returned status %d: %s", resp.StatusCode, string(body))
122: 	}
123: 
124: 	var response types.CreateSandboxResponse
125: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&response); err != nil {
126: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to decode response: %w", err)
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	sandbox, err := m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, response.SessionID)
130: 	if err != nil {
131: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get created sandbox: %w", err)
132: 	}
133: 
134: 	return sandbox, nil
135: }
136: 
137: func GetBaseURL(routerURL, namespace, crName, crKind string) string {
138: 	var resourceType string
139: 	switch strings.ToLower(crKind) {
140: 	case "agentruntime", "agent-runtime":
141: 		resourceType = "agent-runtimes"
142: 	case "codeinterpreter", "code-interpreter":
143: 		resourceType = "code-interpreters"
144: 	default:
145: 		resourceType = "agent-runtimes"
146: 	}
147: 
148: 	baseURL, err := url.JoinPath(routerURL, "/v1/namespaces", namespace, resourceType, crName, "invocations/")
149: 	if err != nil {
150: 		klog.Warningf("Failed to join URL path: %v", err)
151: 		return fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/namespaces/%s/%s/%s/invocations/", routerURL, namespace, resourceType, crName)
152: 	}
153: 
154: 	return baseURL
155: }

25: )

27: type JWTManager struct {
28: 	privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
29: 	publicKey  *rsa.PublicKey
30: 	clientset  kubernetes.Interface
31: 	namespace  string
32: }
33: 
34: func NewJWTManager(clientset kubernetes.Interface) (*JWTManager, error) {
35: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, rsaKeySize)
36: 	if err != nil {
37: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to generate RSA key pair: %w", err)
38: 	}
39: 
40: 	namespace := os.Getenv("AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE")
41: 	if namespace == "" {
42: 		namespace = "default"
43: 	}
44: 
45: 	return &JWTManager{
46: 		privateKey: privateKey,
47: 		publicKey:  &privateKey.PublicKey,
48: 		clientset:  clientset,
49: 		namespace:  namespace,
50: 	}, nil
51: }
52: 
53: type TokenClaims struct {
54: 	SessionID string `json:"session_id"`
55: 	jwt.RegisteredClaims
56: }
57: 
58: func (j *JWTManager) GenerateToken(sessionID string) (string, error) {
59: 	now := time.Now()
60: 	claims := TokenClaims{
61: 		SessionID: sessionID,
62: 		RegisteredClaims: jwt.RegisteredClaims{
63: 			ExpiresAt: jwt.NewNumericDate(now.Add(jwtExpiration)),
64: 			IssuedAt:  jwt.NewNumericDate(now),
65: 			Issuer:    "agentcube-router",
66: 		},
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, claims)
70: 	return token.SignedString(j.privateKey)
71: }

74: 	pubKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(j.publicKey)
75: 	if err != nil {
76: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal public key: %w", err)
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	pubKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
80: 		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
81: 		Bytes: pubKeyBytes,
82: 	})
83: 
84: 	return string(pubKeyPEM), nil
85: }
86: 
87: func (j *JWTManager) TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx context.Context) error {
88: 	secret, err := j.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(j.namespace).Get(ctx, IdentitySecretName, metav1.GetOptions{})
89: 	if err != nil {
90: 		if !errors.IsNotFound(err) {
91: 			return fmt.Errorf("failed to get identity secret: %w", err)
92: 		}
93: 
94: 		return j.createIdentitySecret(ctx)
95: 	}
96: 
97: 	privateKeyPEM := secret.Data["private-key"]
98: 	if len(privateKeyPEM) > 0 {
99: 		block, _ := pem.Decode(privateKeyPEM)
100: 		if block != nil {
101: 			privateKey, err := x509.ParsePKCS1PrivateKey(block.Bytes)
102: 			if err == nil {
103: 				j.privateKey = privateKey
104: 				j.publicKey = &privateKey.PublicKey
105: 				klog.Info("Loaded existing RSA key pair from secret")
106: 				return nil
107: 			}
108: 		}
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	return j.updateIdentitySecret(ctx, secret)
112: }
113: 
114: func (j *JWTManager) createIdentitySecret(ctx context.Context) error {
115: 	privateKeyBytes := x509.MarshalPKCS1PrivateKey(j.privateKey)
116: 	privateKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
117: 		Type:  "RSA PRIVATE KEY",
118: 		Bytes: privateKeyBytes,
119: 	})
120: 
121: 	pubKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(j.publicKey)
122: 	if err != nil {
123: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal public key: %w", err)
124: 	}
125: 	pubKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
126: 		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
127: 		Bytes: pubKeyBytes,
128: 	})
129: 
130: 	secret := &corev1.Secret{
131: 		ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
132: 			Name:      IdentitySecretName,
133: 			Namespace: j.namespace,
134: 		},
135: 		Data: map[string][]byte{
136: 			"private-key": privateKeyPEM,
137: 			"public-key":  pubKeyPEM,
138: 		},
139: 	}
140: 
141: 	_, err = j.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(j.namespace).Create(ctx, secret, metav1.CreateOptions{})
142: 	if err != nil {
143: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create identity secret: %w", err)
144: 	}
145: 
146: 	klog.Info("Created new RSA key pair and stored in secret")
147: 	return nil
148: }
149: 
150: func (j *JWTManager) updateIdentitySecret(ctx context.Context, existing *corev1.Secret) error {
151: 	privateKeyBytes := x509.MarshalPKCS1PrivateKey(j.privateKey)
152: 	privateKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
153: 		Type:  "RSA PRIVATE KEY",
154: 		Bytes: privateKeyBytes,
155: 	})
156: 
157: 	pubKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(j.publicKey)
158: 	if err != nil {
159: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal public key: %w", err)
160: 	}
161: 	pubKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
162: 		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
163: 		Bytes: pubKeyBytes,
164: 	})
165: 
166: 	existing.Data = map[string][]byte{
167: 		"private-key": privateKeyPEM,
168: 		"public-key":  pubKeyPEM,
169: 	}
170: 
171: 	_, err = j.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(j.namespace).Update(ctx, existing, metav1.UpdateOptions{})
172: 	if err != nil {
173: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to update identity secret: %w", err)
174: 	}
175: 
176: 	klog.Info("Updated RSA key pair in secret")
177: 	return nil
178: }

import (
	"context"
	"errors"

	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"

var ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")

type Store interface {
	Ping(ctx context.Context) error
	GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
	UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error
	DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
	ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)

<content>1: package store
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"encoding/json"
6: 	"errors"
7: 	"fmt"
8: 	"os"
9: 	"time"
10: 
11: 	redisv9 "github.com/go-redis/redis/v9"
12: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
13: 
14: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
15: )
16: 
17: type redisStore struct {
18: 	cli                  *redisv9.Client
19: 	sessionPrefix        string
20: 	expiryIndexKey       string
21: 	lastActivityIndexKey string
22: }
23: 
24: func newRedisStore() (Store, error) {
25: 	addr := os.Getenv("REDIS_ADDR")
26: 	if addr == "" {
27: 		return nil, errors.New("REDIS_ADDR is required")
28: 	}
29: 
30: 	password := os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD")
31: 	passwordRequired := os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED")
32: 	if password == "" && passwordRequired != "false" {
33: 		return nil, errors.New("REDIS_PASSWORD is required")
34: 	}
35: 
36: 	cli := redisv9.NewClient(&redisv9.Options{
37: 		Addr:     addr,
38: 		Password: password,
39: 	})
40: 
41: 	return &redisStore{
42: 		cli:                  cli,
43: 		sessionPrefix:        "session:",
44: 		expiryIndexKey:       "session:expiry",
45: 		lastActivityIndexKey: "session:last_activity",
46: 	}, nil
47: }
48: 
49: func (r *redisStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
50: 	return r.cli.Ping(ctx).Err()
51: }
52: 
53: func (r *redisStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
54: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sessionID
55: 	data, err := r.cli.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
56: 	if err != nil {
57: 		if errors.Is(err, redisv9.Nil) {
58: 			return nil, ErrNotFound
59: 		}
60: 		return nil, err
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	var info types.SandboxInfo
64: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
65: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to unmarshal sandbox info: %w", err)
66: 	}
67: 	return &info, nil
68: }
69: 
70: func (r *redisStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
71: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
72: 	if err != nil {
73: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal sandbox info: %w", err)
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sandboxStore.SessionID
77: 
78: 	pipe := r.cli.Pipeline()
79: 	pipe.SetNX(ctx, key, data, 0)
80: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, r.expiryIndexKey, redisv9.Z{
81: 		Score:  float64(sandboxStore.ExpiresAt.Unix()),
82: 		Member: sandboxStore.SessionID,
83: 	})
84: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, r.lastActivityIndexKey, redisv9.Z{
85: 		Score:  float64(sandboxStore.CreatedAt.Unix()),
86: 		Member: sandboxStore.SessionID,
87: 	})
88: 
89: 	_, err = pipe.Exec(ctx)
90: 	return err
91: }
92: 
93: func (r *redisStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
94: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
95: 	if err != nil {
96: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal sandbox info: %w", err)
97: 	}
98: 
99: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sandboxStore.SessionID
100: 	return r.cli.Set(ctx, key, data, 0).Err()
101: }
102: 
103: func (r *redisStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
104: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sessionID
105: 
106: 	pipe := r.cli.Pipeline()
107: 	pipe.Del(ctx, key)
108: 	pipe.ZRem(ctx, r.expiryIndexKey, sessionID)
109: 	pipe.ZRem(ctx, r.lastActivityIndexKey, sessionID)
110: 
111: 	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
112: 	return err
113: }
114: 
115: func (r *redisStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
116: 	result, err := r.cli.ZRangeByScore(ctx, r.expiryIndexKey, &redisv9.ZRangeBy{
117: 		Min:   "-inf",
118: 		Max:   fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
119: 		Count: limit,
120: 	}).Result()
121: 	if err != nil {
122: 		return nil, err
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	return r.batchGetSandboxes(ctx, result)
126: }
127: 
128: func (r *redisStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
129: 	result, err := r.cli.ZRangeByScore(ctx, r.lastActivityIndexKey, &redisv9.ZRangeBy{
130: 		Min:   "-inf",
131: 		Max:   fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
132: 		Count: limit,
133: 	}).Result()
134: 	if err != nil {
135: 		return nil, err
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	return r.batchGetSandboxes(ctx, result)
139: }
140: 
141: func (r *redisStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
142: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sessionID
143: 	exists, err := r.cli.Exists(ctx, key).Result()
144: 	if err != nil {
145: 		return err
146: 	}
147: 	if exists == 0 {
148: 		return ErrNotFound
149: 	}
150: 
151: 	return r.cli.ZAdd(ctx, r.lastActivityIndexKey, redisv9.Z{
152: 		Score:  float64(at.Unix()),
153: 		Member: sessionID,
154: 	}).Err()
155: }
156: 
157: func (r *redisStore) Close() error {
158: 	return r.cli.Close()
159: }
160: 
161: func (r *redisStore) batchGetSandboxes(ctx context.Context, sessionIDs []string) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
162: 	if len(sessionIDs) == 0 {
163: 		return nil, nil
164: 	}
165: 
166: 	pipe := r.cli.Pipeline()
167: 	cmds := make([]*redisv9.StringCmd, len(sessionIDs))
168: 	for i, id := range sessionIDs {
169: 		key := r.sessionPrefix + id
170: 		cmds[i] = pipe.Get(ctx, key)
171: 	}
172: 
173: 	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
174: 	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, redisv9.Nil) {
175: 		return nil, err
176: 	}
177: 
178: 	var sandboxes []*types.SandboxInfo
179: 	for i, cmd := range cmds {
180: 		data, err := cmd.Bytes()
181: 		if err != nil {
182: 			if errors.Is(err, redisv9.Nil) {
183: 				klog.Warningf("session %s not found in store", sessionIDs[i])
184: 				continue
185: 			}
186: 			return nil, err
187: 		}
188: 
189: 		var info types.SandboxInfo
190: 		if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
191: 			klog.Warningf("failed to unmarshal sandbox info for session %s: %v", sessionIDs[i], err)
192: 			continue
193: 		}
194: 		sandboxes = append(sandboxes, &info)
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	return sandboxes, nil
198: }

20: 	sessionPrefix        string
21: 	expiryIndexKey       string
22: 	lastActivityIndexKey string
23: }
24: 
25: func newValkeyStore() (Store, error) {
26: 	addrs := os.Getenv("VALKEY_ADDR")
27: 	if addrs == "" {
28: 		return nil, errors.New("VALKEY_ADDR is required")
29: 	}
30: 
31: 	password := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD")
32: 	passwordRequired := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED")
33: 	if password == "" && passwordRequired != "false" {
34: 		return nil, errors.New("VALKEY_PASSWORD is required")
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	opts := valkey.ClientOption{
38: 		InitAddress: strings.Split(addrs, ","),
39: 		Password:    password,
40: 	}
41: 
42: 	if os.Getenv("VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE") == "true" {
43: 		opts.DisableCache = true
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	if os.Getenv("VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE") == "true" {
47: 		opts.ForceSingle = true
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	cli, err := valkey.NewClient(opts)
51: 	if err != nil {
52: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create valkey client: %w", err)
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	return &valkeyStore{
56: 		cli:                  cli,
57: 		sessionPrefix:        "session:",
58: 		expiryIndexKey:       "session:expiry",
59: 		lastActivityIndexKey: "session:last_activity",
60: 	}, nil
61: }
62: 
63: func (v *valkeyStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
64: 	return v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Ping().Build()).Error()
65: }
66: 
67: func (v *valkeyStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
68: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sessionID
69: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Get().Key(key).Build())
70: 	if err := result.Error(); err != nil {
71: 		if isValkeyNil(err) {
72: 			return nil, ErrNotFound
73: 		}
74: 		return nil, err
75: 	}
76: 
77: 	data, err := result.AsBytes()
78: 	if err != nil {
79: 		return nil, err
80: 	}
81: 
82: 	var info types.SandboxInfo
83: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
84: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to unmarshal sandbox info: %w", err)
85: 	}
86: 	return &info, nil
87: }
88: 
89: func (v *valkeyStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
90: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
91: 	if err != nil {
92: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal sandbox info: %w", err)
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sandboxStore.SessionID
96: 
97: 	commands := []valkey.Completed{
98: 		v.cli.B().Setnx().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Build(),
99: 		v.cli.B().Zadd().Key(v.expiryIndexKey).ScoreMember().
100: 			ScoreMember(valkey.Z{Score: float64(sandboxStore.ExpiresAt.Unix()), Member: sandboxStore.SessionID}).Build(),
101: 		v.cli.B().Zadd().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).ScoreMember().
102: 			ScoreMember(valkey.Z{Score: float64(sandboxStore.CreatedAt.Unix()), Member: sandboxStore.SessionID}).Build(),
103: 	}
104: 
105: 	for _, cmd := range commands {
106: 		if err := v.cli.Do(ctx, cmd).Error(); err != nil {
107: 			return err
108: 		}
109: 	}
110: 	return nil
111: }
112: 
113: func (v *valkeyStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
114: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
115: 	if err != nil {
116: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to marshal sandbox info: %w", err)
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sandboxStore.SessionID
120: 	return v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Set().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Build()).Error()
121: }
122: 
123: func (v *valkeyStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
124: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sessionID
125: 
126: 	commands := []valkey.Completed{
127: 		v.cli.B().Del().Key(key).Build(),
128: 		v.cli.B().Zrem().Key(v.expiryIndexKey).Member(sessionID).Build(),
129: 		v.cli.B().Zrem().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).Member(sessionID).Build(),
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	for _, cmd := range commands {
133: 		if err := v.cli.Do(ctx, cmd).Error(); err != nil {
134: 			return err
135: 		}
136: 	}
137: 	return nil
138: }
139: 
140: func (v *valkeyStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
141: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Zrangebyscore().
142: 		Key(v.expiryIndexKey).
143: 		Min("-inf").
144: 		Max(fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix())).
145: 		Limit(0, limit).
146: 		Build())
147: 
148: 	if err := result.Error(); err != nil {
149: 		return nil, err
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	sessionIDs, err := result.AsStrSlice()
153: 	if err != nil {
154: 		return nil, err
155: 	}
156: 
157: 	return v.batchGetSandboxes(ctx, sessionIDs)
158: }
159: 
160: func (v *valkeyStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
161: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Zrangebyscore().
162: 		Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).
163: 		Min("-inf").
164: 		Max(fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix())).
165: 		Limit(0, limit).
166: 		Build())
167: 
168: 	if err := result.Error(); err != nil {
169: 		return nil, err
170: 	}
171: 
172: 	sessionIDs, err := result.AsStrSlice()
173: 	if err != nil {
174: 		return nil, err
175: 	}
176: 
177: 	return v.batchGetSandboxes(ctx, sessionIDs)
178: }
179: 
180: func (v *valkeyStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
181: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sessionID
182: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Exists().Key(key).Build())
183: 	if err := result.Error(); err != nil {
184: 		return err
185: 	}
186: 
187: 	count, err := result.AsInt64()
188: 	if err != nil {
189: 		return err
190: 	}
191: 	if count == 0 {
192: 		return ErrNotFound
193: 	}
194: 
195: 	return v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Zadd().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).
196: 		ScoreMember().ScoreMember(valkey.Z{Score: float64(at.Unix()), Member: sessionID}).Build()).Error()
197: }
198: 
199: func (v *valkeyStore) Close() error {
200: 	v.cli.Close()
201: 	return nil
202: }
203: 
204: func (v *valkeyStore) batchGetSandboxes(ctx context.Context, sessionIDs []string) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
205: 	if len(sessionIDs) == 0 {
206: 		return nil, nil
207: 	}
208: 
209: 	var sandboxes []*types.SandboxInfo
210: 	for _, id := range sessionIDs {
211: 		key := v.sessionPrefix + id
212: 		result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.B().Get().Key(key).Build())
213: 		if err := result.Error(); err != nil {
214: 			if isValkeyNil(err) {
215: 				klog.Warningf("session %s not found in store", id)
216: 				continue
217: 			}
218: 			return nil, err
219: 		}
220: 
221: 		data, err := result.AsBytes()
222: 		if err != nil {
223: 			return nil, err
224: 		}
225: 
226: 		var info types.SandboxInfo
227: 		if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
228: 			klog.Warningf("failed to unmarshal sandbox info for session %s: %v", id, err)
229: 			continue
230: 		}
231: 		sandboxes = append(sandboxes, &info)
232: 	}
233: 
234: 	return sandboxes, nil
235: }
236: 
237: func isValkeyNil(err error) bool {
238: 	return err != nil && err.Error() == "redis: nil"
239: }

</content>

69: }

<content>1: package picod
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"crypto/rsa"
6: 	"errors"
7: 	"net/http"
8: 	"os"
9: 	"strings"
10: 	"sync"
11: 
12: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
13: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
14: )
15: 
16: const (
17: 	PublicKeyEnvVar = "PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY"
18: 	MaxBodySize     = 32 << 20
19: )
20: 
21: type AuthManager struct {
22: 	publicKey *rsa.PublicKey
23: 	mutex     sync.RWMutex
24: }
25: 
26: func NewAuthManager() *AuthManager {
27: 	return &AuthManager{}
28: }
29: 
30: func (am *AuthManager) LoadPublicKeyFromEnv() error {
31: 	pubKeyPEM := os.Getenv(PublicKeyEnvVar)
32: 	if pubKeyPEM == "" {
33: 		return errors.New("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY environment variable is not set")
34: 	}
35: 
36: 	pubKeyPEM = strings.TrimSpace(pubKeyPEM)
37: 
38: 	block, _ := jwt.ParseRSAPublicKeyFromPEM([]byte(pubKeyPEM))
39: 	if block == nil {
40: 		pubKey, err := jwt.ParseRSAPublicKeyFromPEM([]byte(pubKeyPEM))
41: 		if err != nil {
42: 			return err
43: 		}
44: 		am.mutex.Lock()
45: 		am.publicKey = pubKey
46: 		am.mutex.Unlock()
47: 		return nil
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	am.mutex.Lock()
51: 	am.publicKey = block
52: 	am.mutex.Unlock()
53: 	return nil
54: }
55: 
56: func (am *AuthManager) AuthMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
57: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
58: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
59: 		if authHeader == "" {
60: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "Missing authorization header"})
61: 			c.Abort()
62: 			return
63: 		}
64: 
65: 		parts := strings.SplitN(authHeader, " ", 2)
66: 		if len(parts) != 2 || !strings.EqualFold(parts[0], "Bearer") {
67: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "Invalid authorization header format"})
68: 			c.Abort()
69: 			return
70: 		}
71: 
72: 		tokenString := parts[1]
73: 
74: 		am.mutex.RLock()
75: 		pubKey := am.publicKey
76: 		am.mutex.RUnlock()
77: 
78: 		if pubKey == nil {
79: 			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "Public key not loaded"})
80: 			c.Abort()
81: 			return
82: 		}
83: 
84: 		token, err := jwt.Parse(tokenString, func(token *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
85: 			if _, ok := token.Method.(*jwt.SigningMethodRSA); !ok {
86: 				return nil, errors.New("unexpected signing method")
87: 			}
88: 			return pubKey, nil
89: 		})
90: 
91: 		if err != nil || !token.Valid {
92: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "Invalid token"})
93: 			c.Abort()
94: 			return
95: 		}
96: 
97: 		claims, ok := token.Claims.(jwt.MapClaims)
98: 		if !ok {
99: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "Invalid token claims"})
100: 			c.Abort()
101: 			return
102: 		}
103: 
104: 		c.Set("claims", claims)
105: 
106: 		c.Request.Body = http.MaxBytesReader(c.Writer, c.Request.Body, MaxBodySize)
107: 		c.Next()
108: 	}
109: }
110: 
111: func GetClaimsFromContext(ctx context.Context) jwt.MapClaims {
112: 	if ginCtx, ok := ctx.(*gin.Context); ok {
113: 		if claims, exists := ginCtx.Get("claims"); exists {
114: 			if mapClaims, ok := claims.(jwt.MapClaims); ok {
115: 				return mapClaims
116: 			}
117: 		}
118: 	}
119: 	return nil
120: }
121: 
122: func GetSessionIDFromContext(ctx context.Context) string {
123: 	claims := GetClaimsFromContext(ctx)
124: 	if claims != nil {
125: 		if sessionID, ok := claims["session_id"].(string); ok {
126: 			return sessionID
127: 		}
128: 	}
129: 	return ""
130: }
131: 
132: func (am *AuthManager) GetPublicKey() *rsa.PublicKey {
133: 	am.mutex.RLock()
134: 	defer am.mutex.RUnlock()
135: 	return am.publicKey
136: }
137: 
138: func (am *AuthManager) SetPublicKey(key *rsa.PublicKey) {
139: 	am.mutex.Lock()
140: 	defer am.mutex.Unlock()
141: 	am.publicKey = key
142: }
143: 
144: type contextKey string
145: 
146: const (
147: 	ClaimsContextKey  contextKey = "claims"
148: 	SessionContextKey contextKey = "session_id"
149: )
150: 
151: func GetContextWithClaims(ctx context.Context, claims jwt.MapClaims) context.Context {
152: 	return context.WithValue(ctx, ClaimsContextKey, claims)
153: }
154: 
155: func GetContextWithSessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) context.Context {
156: 	return context.WithValue(ctx, SessionContextKey, sessionID)
157: }

37: 	StartTime time.Time `json:"start_time"`
38: 	EndTime   time.Time `json:"end_time"`
39: }
40: 
41: type FileInfo struct {
42: 	Path     string    `json:"path"`
43: 	Size     int64     `json:"size"`
44: 	Mode     string    `json:"mode"`
45: 	Modified time.Time `json:"modified"`
46: }
47: 
48: type UploadFileRequest struct {
49: 	Path    string `json:"path" binding:"required"`
50: 	Content string `json:"content" binding:"required"`
51: 	Mode    string `json:"mode"`
52: }
53: 
54: type ListFilesResponse struct {
55: 	Files []FileEntry `json:"files"`
56: }
57: 
58: type FileEntry struct {
59: 	Name string `json:"name"`
60: 	Type string `json:"type"`
61: }
62: 
63: func ExecuteHandler(workspace string) gin.HandlerFunc {
64: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
65: 		var req ExecuteRequest
66: 		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
67: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
68: 			return
69: 		}
70: 
71: 		if len(req.Command) == 0 {
72: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "command is required"})
73: 			return
74: 		}
75: 
76: 		timeout := 60 * time.Second
77: 		if req.Timeout != "" {
78: 			if parsed, err := time.ParseDuration(req.Timeout); err == nil {
79: 				timeout = parsed
80: 			}
81: 		}
82: 
83: 		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(c.Request.Context(), timeout)
84: 		defer cancel()
85: 
86: 		workingDir := req.WorkingDir
87: 		if workingDir == "" {
88: 			workingDir = workspace
89: 		}
90: 		workingDir = sanitizePath(workspace, workingDir)
91: 
92: 		cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, req.Command[0], req.Command[1:]...)
93: 		cmd.Dir = workingDir
94: 
95: 		if req.Env != nil {
96: 			cmd.Env = os.Environ()
97: 			for k, v := range req.Env {
98: 				cmd.Env = append(cmd.Env, fmt.Sprintf("%s=%s", k, v))
99: 			}
100: 		}
101: 
102: 		var stdout, stderr bytes.Buffer
103: 		cmd.Stdout = &stdout
104: 		cmd.Stderr = &stderr
105: 
106: 		startTime := time.Now()
107: 		err := cmd.Run()
108: 		endTime := time.Now()
109: 
110: 		exitCode := 0
111: 		if err != nil {
112: 			if exitErr, ok := err.(*exec.ExitError); ok {
113: 				exitCode = exitErr.ExitCode()
114: 			} else if ctx.Err() == context.DeadlineExceeded {
115: 				exitCode = TimeoutExitCode
116: 			} else {
117: 				exitCode = 1
118: 			}
119: 		}
120: 
121: 		response := ExecuteResponse{
122: 			Stdout:    stdout.String(),
123: 			Stderr:    stderr.String(),
124: 			ExitCode:  exitCode,
125: 			Duration:  endTime.Sub(startTime).Seconds(),
126: 			StartTime: startTime,
127: 			EndTime:   endTime,
128: 		}
129: 
130: 		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, response)
131: 	}
132: }
133: 
134: func UploadFileHandler(workspace string) gin.HandlerFunc {
135: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
136: 		contentType := c.GetHeader("Content-Type")
137: 
138: 		if strings.HasPrefix(contentType, "multipart/form-data") {
139: 			file, header, err := c.Request.FormFile("file")
140: 			if err != nil {
141: 				c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "failed to get file from form"})
142: 				return
143: 			}
144: 			defer file.Close()
145: 
146: 			remotePath := c.PostForm("path")
147: 			if remotePath == "" {
148: 				remotePath = header.Filename
149: 			}
150: 
151: 			remotePath = sanitizePath(workspace, remotePath)
152: 
153: 			if err := os.MkdirAll(filepath.Dir(remotePath), 0755); err != nil {
154: 				c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": fmt.Sprintf("failed to create directory: %v", err)})
155: 				return
156: 			}
157: 
158: 			dst, err := os.Create(remotePath)
159: 			if err != nil {
160: 				c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": fmt.Sprintf("failed to create file: %v", err)})
161: 				return
162: 			}
163: 			defer dst.Close()
164: 
165: 			if _, err := io.Copy(dst, file); err != nil {
166: 				c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": fmt.Sprintf("failed to write file: %v", err)})
167: 				return
168: 			}
169: 
170: 			c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"path": remotePath, "status": "uploaded"})
171: 			return
172: 		}
173: 
174: 		var req UploadFileRequest
175: 		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
176: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
177: 			return
178: 		}
179: 
180: 		remotePath := sanitizePath(workspace, req.Path)
181: 
182: 		content, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(req.Content)
183: 		if err != nil {
184: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "failed to decode base64 content"})
185: 			return
186: 		}
187: 
188: 		if err := os.MkdirAll(filepath.Dir(remotePath), 0755); err != nil {
189: 			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": fmt.Sprintf("failed to create directory: %v", err)})
190: 			return
191: 		}
192: 
193: 		mode := os.FileMode(0644)
194: 		if req.Mode != "" {
195: 			if m, err := strconv.ParseInt(req.Mode, 8, 32); err == nil {
196: 				mode = os.FileMode(m & maxFileMode)
197: 			}
198: 		}
199: 
200: 		if err := os.WriteFile(remotePath, content, mode); err != nil {
201: 			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": fmt.Sprintf("failed to write file: %v", err)})
202: 			return
203: 		}
204: 
205: 		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"path": remotePath, "status": "created"})
206: 	}
207: }
208: 
209: func DownloadFileHandler(workspace string) gin.HandlerFunc {
210: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
211: 		path := c.Param("path")
212: 		path = strings.TrimPrefix(path, "/")
213: 		path = sanitizePath(workspace, path)
214: 
215: 		info, err := os.Stat(path)
216: 		if err != nil {
217: 			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "file not found"})
218: 			return
219: 		}
220: 
221: 		if info.IsDir() {
222: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "cannot download a directory"})
223: 			return
224: 		}
225: 
226: 		c.Header("Content-Disposition", fmt.Sprintf("attachment; filename=%s", filepath.Base(path)))
227: 		c.Header("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream")
228: 		c.File(path)
229: 	}
230: }
231: 
232: func ListFilesHandler(workspace string) gin.HandlerFunc {
233: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
234: 		path := c.Query("path")
235: 		if path == "" {
236: 			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "path query parameter is required"})
237: 			return
238: 		}
239: 
240: 		path = sanitizePath(workspace, path)
241: 
242: 		entries, err := os.ReadDir(path)
243: 		if err != nil {
244: 			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": fmt.Sprintf("failed to read directory: %v", err)})
245: 			return
246: 		}
247: 
248: 		var files []FileEntry
249: 		for _, entry := range entries {
250: 			fileType := "file"
251: 			if entry.IsDir() {
252: 				fileType = "directory"
253: 			}
254: 			files = append(files, FileEntry{
255: 				Name: entry.Name(),
256: 				Type: fileType,
257: 			})
258: 		}
259: 
260: 		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, ListFilesResponse{Files: files})
261: 	}
262: }
263: 
264: func sanitizePath(workspace, path string) string {
265: 	if filepath.IsAbs(path) {
266: 		return path
267: 	}
268: 
269: 	absPath := filepath.Join(workspace, path)
270: 	absPath = filepath.Clean(absPath)
271: 
272: 	if !strings.HasPrefix(absPath, workspace) {
273: 		return workspace
274: 	}
275: 
276: 	return absPath
277: }
278: 
279: func HealthHandler(c *gin.Context) {
280: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "healthy"})
281: }

47: 		}

50:

input.content:
import logging
from typing import Optional, Any
from urllib.parse import urljoin

import requests

from ..utils.http import create_session


class AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient:
    SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"

    def __init__(
        self,
        router_url: str,
        namespace: str = "default",
        agent_name: Optional[str] = None,
        timeout: int = 120,
        connect_timeout: float = 5.0,
        pool_connections: int = 10,
        pool_maxsize: int = 10,
    ):
        self.timeout = timeout
        self.connect_timeout = connect_timeout

        self.base_url = urljoin(
            router_url.rstrip("/") + "/",
            f"v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/",
        )

        self._session = create_session(pool_connections, pool_maxsize)
        self._logger = logging.getLogger("agentcube.agent_runtime_data_plane")

    def bootstrap_session_id(self) -> str:
        resp = self._session.get(
            self.base_url,
            timeout=(self.connect_timeout, self.timeout),
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()

        session_id = resp.headers.get(self.SESSION_HEADER)
        if not session_id:
            raise ValueError("Response missing x-agentcube-session-id header")
        return session_id

    def invoke(self, session_id: str, payload: Any, timeout: Optional[int] = None) -> Any:
        if timeout is None:
            timeout = self.timeout

        headers = {
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            self.SESSION_HEADER: session_id,
        }

        resp = self._session.post(
            self.base_url,
            json=payload,
            headers=headers,
            timeout=(self.connect_timeout, timeout),
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        return resp.json()

    def close(self):
        if self._session:
            self._session.close()
            self._session = None

input.content:
import requests
from requests.adapters import HTTPAdapter


def create_session(pool_connections: int = 10, pool_maxsize: int = 10) -> requests.Session:
    session = requests.Session()
    adapter = HTTPAdapter(pool_connections=pool_connections, pool_maxsize=pool_maxsize)
    session.mount("http://", adapter)
    session.mount("https://", adapter)
    return session

[project]
name = "agentcube-cli"
version = "0.1.0"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
    "typer[all]>=0.9.0",
    "pydantic>=2.0.0",
    "pyyaml>=6.0",
    "httpx>=0.24.0",
    "docker>=6.0.0",
    "rich>=13.0.0",
    "packaging>=23.0",
    "importlib-resources>=6.0.0",
    "semver>=3.0.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
k8s = ["kubernetes>=28.0.0"]

[project.scripts]
kubectl-agentcube = "agentcube.cli.main:app"

[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[tool.setuptools]
packages = ["agentcube", "agentcube.cli", "agentcube.models", "agentcube.services", "agentcube.runtime"]

input.content:
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional


@dataclass
class MetadataOptions:
    agent_name: Optional[str] = None
    language: Optional[str] = "python"
    entrypoint: Optional[str] = None
    port: Optional[int] = 8080
    build_mode: Optional[str] = "local"
    requirements_file: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    workload_manager_url: Optional[str] = ""
    router_url: Optional[str] = ""
    readiness_probe_path: Optional[str] = ""
    readiness_probe_port: Optional[int] = 8080
    registry_url: Optional[str] = ""
    registry_username: Optional[str] = ""
    registry_password: Optional[str] = ""
    agent_endpoint: Optional[str] = ""
