import logging
import sys
from typing import Optional

import typer
from rich import print as rprint

app = typer.Typer(
    name="agentcube",
    help="AgentCube CLI - Deploy and manage AI agents on Kubernetes",
    no_args_is_help=True,
    rich_markup_mode="rich",
    add_completion=False,
)

from ..runtime.pack_runtime import PackRuntime
from ..runtime.build_runtime import BuildRuntime
from ..runtime.publish_runtime import PublishRuntime
from ..runtime.invoke_runtime import InvokeRuntime
from ..runtime.status_runtime import StatusRuntime


def version_callback(value: bool):
    if value:
        from .. import __version__
        rprint(f"[bold green]agentcube[/bold green] version {__version__}")
        raise typer.Exit()


def _handle_error(e: Exception, command_name: str, verbose: bool):
    rprint(f"[bold red]Error in {command_name}:[/bold red] {str(e)}")
    if verbose:
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
    sys.exit(1)


@app.callback()
def main(
    version: Optional[bool] = typer.Option(
        None,
        "--version",
        "-v",
        callback=version_callback,
        is_eager=True,
        help="Show version and exit",
    ),
    verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable verbose output"),
):
    if verbose:
        logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)


@app.command()
def pack(
    workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "--workspace", "-f", help="Workspace directory"),
    agent_name: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--agent-name", help="Agent name"),
    language: str = typer.Option("python", "--language", "-l", help="Agent language"),
    entrypoint: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--entrypoint", "-e", help="Entrypoint command"),
    port: int = typer.Option(8080, "--port", "-p", help="Agent port"),
    build_mode: str = typer.Option("local", "--build-mode", help="Build mode"),
    description: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--description", "-d", help="Agent description"),
    output: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--output", "-o", help="Output directory"),
    verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose"),
):
    try:
        runtime = PackRuntime()
        result = runtime.pack(
            workspace_path=workspace,
            agent_name=agent_name,
            language=language,
            entrypoint=entrypoint,
            port=port,
            build_mode=build_mode,
            description=description,
            output=output,
            verbose=verbose,
        )
        rprint(f"[green]Successfully packed agent:[/green] {result['agent_name']}")
        rprint(f"  Workspace: {result['workspace_path']}")
        rprint(f"  Metadata: {result['metadata_path']}")
    except Exception as e:
        _handle_error(e, "pack", verbose)


@app.command()
def build(
    workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "--workspace", "-f", help="Workspace directory"),
    proxy: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--proxy", "-p", help="Proxy URL"),
    cloud_provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--cloud-provider", help="Cloud provider"),
    output: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--output", "-o", help="Output directory"),
    verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose"),
):
    try:
        runtime = BuildRuntime()
        result = runtime.build(
            workspace_path=workspace,
            proxy=proxy,
            cloud_provider=cloud_provider,
            output=output,
            verbose=verbose,
        )
        rprint(f"[green]Successfully built image:[/green] {result['image_name']}")
        rprint(f"  Image ID: {result['image_id']}")
        rprint(f"  Size: {result['image_size']}")
    except Exception as e:
        _handle_error(e, "build", verbose)


@app.command()
def publish(
    workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "--workspace", "-f", help="Workspace directory"),
    version: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--version", help="Version to publish"),
    image_url: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-url", help="Image URL"),
    image_username: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-username", help="Registry username"),
    image_password: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-password", help="Registry password"),
    description: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--description", "-d", help="Agent description"),
    region: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--region", help="Deployment region"),
    cloud_provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--cloud-provider", help="Cloud provider"),
    provider: str = typer.Option("agentcube", "--provider", help="Provider type"),
    node_port: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, "--node-port", help="Node port"),
    replicas: int = typer.Option(1, "--replicas", "-r", help="Number of replicas"),
    namespace: str = typer.Option("default", "--namespace", "-n", help="Kubernetes namespace"),
    verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose"),
):
    try:
        runtime = PublishRuntime()
        result = runtime.publish(
            workspace_path=workspace,
            version=version,
            image_url=image_url,
            image_username=image_username,
            image_password=image_password,
            description=description,
            region=region,
            cloud_provider=cloud_provider,
            provider=provider,
            node_port=node_port,
            replicas=replicas,
            namespace=namespace,
            verbose=verbose,
        )
        rprint(f"[green]Successfully published agent[/green]")
        rprint(f"  Endpoint: {result.get('endpoint', 'N/A')}")
    except Exception as e:
        _handle_error(e, "publish", verbose)


@app.command()
def invoke(
    workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "--workspace", "-f", help="Workspace directory"),
    payload: str = typer.Option("{}", "--payload", help="JSON payload"),
    header: list[str] = typer.Option([], "--header", "-H", help="Headers (key:value)"),
    provider: str = typer.Option("agentcube", "--provider", help="Provider type"),
    verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose"),
):
    try:
        import json
        try:
            parsed_payload = json.loads(payload)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            raise ValueError("Invalid JSON payload")

        headers = {}
        for h in header:
            if ":" in h:
                key, value = h.split(":", 1)
                headers[key.strip()] = value.strip()

        runtime = InvokeRuntime()
        result = runtime.invoke(
            workspace_path=workspace,
            payload=parsed_payload,
            headers=headers,
            provider=provider,
            verbose=verbose,
        )
        rprint(f"[green]Response:[/green]")
        rprint(result)
    except Exception as e:
        _handle_error(e, "invoke", verbose)


@app.command()
def status(
    workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "--workspace", "-f", help="Workspace directory"),
    provider: str = typer.Option("agentcube", "--provider", help="Provider type"),
    verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose"),
):
    try:
        runtime = StatusRuntime()
        result = runtime.get_status(
            workspace_path=workspace,
            provider=provider,
            verbose=verbose,
        )
        from rich.table import Table
        table = Table(title="Agent Status")
        table.add_column("Property")
        table.add_column("Value")
        for key, value in result.items():
            table.add_row(key, str(value))
        from rich.console import Console
        console = Console()
        console.print(table)

        if result.get("status") in ("not_published", "error"):
            sys.exit(1)
    except Exception as e:
        _handle_error(e, "status", verbose)

input.content:
import logging
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any

from ..services.metadata_service import load_metadata, AgentMetadata
from ..services.docker_service import push_image
from ..services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider


logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class PublishRuntime:
    def publish(
        self,
        workspace_path: str,
        version: Optional[str] = None,
        image_url: Optional[str] = None,
        image_username: Optional[str] = None,
        image_password: Optional[str] = None,
        description: Optional[str] = None,
        region: Optional[str] = None,
        cloud_provider: Optional[str] = None,
        provider: str = "agentcube",
        node_port: Optional[int] = None,
        replicas: int = 1,
        namespace: str = "default",
        verbose: bool = False,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        metadata = load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if version:
            metadata.version = version
        if description:
            metadata.description = description

        final_image_url = image_url or metadata.image_url
        if not final_image_url:
            raise ValueError("image_url is required (set via --image-url or build first)")

        if provider == "agentcube":
            return self._publish_cr_to_k8s(
                workspace_path=workspace_path,
                metadata=metadata,
                image_url=final_image_url,
                namespace=namespace,
                node_port=node_port,
                replicas=replicas,
                verbose=verbose,
            )
        elif provider == "k8s":
            return self._publish_k8s(
                metadata=metadata,
                image_url=final_image_url,
                namespace=namespace,
                node_port=node_port,
                replicas=replicas,
                verbose=verbose,
            )
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unsupported provider: {provider}")

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(
        self,
        metadata: AgentMetadata,
        image_url: Optional[str],
        image_username: Optional[str],
        image_password: Optional[str],
    ) -> str:
        if image_url:
            return image_url

        if metadata.image_url:
            if image_username and image_password:
                push_result = push_image(
                    image_name=metadata.image_url,
                    username=image_username,
                    password=image_password,
                )
                return push_result["pushed_image"]
            return metadata.image_url

        raise ValueError("No image URL available. Build or provide --image-url")

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(
        self,
        workspace_path: str,
        metadata: AgentMetadata,
        image_url: str,
        namespace: str,
        node_port: Optional[int],
        replicas: int,
        verbose: bool,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentcubeProvider

        provider = AgentcubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=verbose)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        return {"endpoint": metadata.router_url, "name": metadata.agent_name, **result}

    def _publish_k8s(
        self,
        metadata: AgentMetadata,
        image_url: str,
        namespace: str,
        node_port: Optional[int],
        replicas: int,
        verbose: bool,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=verbose)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=replicas,
            node_port=node_port,
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        return result
